## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call to discuss professional backgrounds and explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both participants have extensive experience in tech journalism, content creation, and startup growth](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) is closing a $12M Series A round, reaching $6M ARR in under 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [The company is building AI-powered workflows to accelerate content creation and knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [There's potential for collaboration given the complementary skillsets and industry connections](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

## Topics

### Professional Backgrounds

  - [Matthew (panzer):](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
    
      - [Started as a photographer, transitioned to tech journalism in 2009](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Worked at The Next Web, then TechCrunch for 10 years (became Editor-in-Chief)](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
      - [Grew TechCrunch Disrupt from 3,200 to 10,000+ attendees](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [Oversaw TechCrunch Battlefield, with startups raising over $8B](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Recently worked as VP of Marketing at Tiptop (Postmates founder's new startup)](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)

  - [Marcel Santilli:](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
    
      - [Built content marketing programs at IBM and HP, growing significant revenue](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Created TechBeacon.com at HP, reaching 1M monthly visitors](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
      - [Worked at HashiCorp as an early marketing leader](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
      - [Founded fwd.digital, applying AI to content creation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)

### fwd.digital's Business Model and Growth

  - [Provides AI-powered content creation and distribution services](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [Recently reached $6M ARR, growing from $0 to $2.9M ARR in Q4 2023](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)
  - [71% gross margin, 28% EBITDA (profitable)](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
  - [Closing a $12M Series A round](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [56 deals in the pipeline, with Marcel still doing most demos](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
  - [Scaling by hiring managing directors with industry experience](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1964.0)

### AI-Powered Workflows

  - [Represent content creation workflows as code](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
  - [Automate research, source gathering, and content structuring](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Example workflow processed hundreds of sources in 2 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Potential applications beyond content creation to other knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)

### Future Plans and Investment Focus

  - [Primary focus on engineering hires](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)
  - [Minimal marketing spend currently (4 LinkedIn posts in 4 months)](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
  - [No dedicated sales team yet](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
  - [Exploring ways to accelerate and improve knowledge work processes](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)

  - [Exchange contact information for follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/xXrddWA--zXoP7Awfkso63LfkxXzU5xD?tab=summary&timestamp=1990.0)
